title: Psychology for Mortals
subtitle: Simple answers for complex minds
author: Wordsus Team
description: Explore the mysteries of the mind and human behavior through 52 weekly lessons. Simple answers to understand your emotions, biases, and relationships.

chapters.title: Overconfidence: The Great Deception of Our Human Mind
chapters.description: Today we explore the famous Dunning-Kruger Effect. We explain why incompetent people overestimate their skills while experts always tend to doubt themselves.

chapters.title: Brain Traps: When Your Own Actions Lie to You Every Day
chapters.description: We analyze cognitive dissonance, that mental tension we experience when our deepest beliefs and our daily actions contradict each other without any remedy.

chapters.title: False Memories: That Distant Past That Has Never Existed
chapters.description: Dive into the intriguing Mandela Effect. Discover how large groups of people manage to share detailed memories of events that never actually occurred at all.

chapters.title: Hidden Faces: Searching for Meaning in the Thick Fog
chapters.description: We explore pareidolia, that innate tendency of the human mind that leads us to find faces, distinct shapes, and meaningful patterns in simple plain objects.

chapters.title: Echo Chambers: Listening Only to What We Love to Hear
chapters.description: We unravel the confirmation bias to understand exactly why we only validate the information that supports what we believe, ignoring all the evidence against it.

chapters.title: Time Mysteries: That Strange Moment We Have Lived Today
chapters.description: We explain the various neurological theories behind the Déjà Vu phenomenon and exactly why we feel with such deep certainty that we lived a brand new moment.

chapters.title: Awake While Dreaming: Controlling Your Unreal World Now
chapters.description: Delve into the fascinating universe of lucid dreaming. We analyze how it is totally possible to be aware of dreaming and manage to take control of the scene.

chapters.title: The Erased Past: Exactly Why We Forget Your Early Years
chapters.description: We investigate mysterious childhood amnesia. Learn exactly why we humans are completely unable to remember almost any experience from our very first few years.

chapters.title: Incomplete Tasks: The Busy Mind That Fails to Forget It
chapters.description: We address the Zeigarnik Effect to understand why our memory remembers interrupted tasks much better compared to those that we have already finished completely.

chapters.title: The Invisible Gorilla: What We See and Do Not Register
chapters.description: We discuss inattentional blindness. Using the gorilla experiment, we will see how we ignore very obvious details if the mind is focused on other silly things.

chapters.title: Passive Crowds: The Serious Risk of Being Surrounded Now
chapters.description: Today we analyze the Bystander Effect. We will understand the sad paradox that, in an emergency, more witnesses mean less help for those who truly need it.

chapters.title: Blind Obedience: The Very Thin Line Towards Complete Evil
chapters.description: We review the terrifying Milgram Experiment. We will see to what extent an ordinary person can cause deep pain to another just by following superior orders.

chapters.title: Mental Prisons: Exactly When Absolute Power Corrupts All
chapters.description: We study the Stanford Prison Experiment to see how simple socially assigned roles can completely destroy the inherent morality of otherwise normal individuals.

chapters.title: Deceptive Beauty: The Pretty Is Never Always The Best
chapters.description: We unmask the Halo Effect, a cognitive bias that makes us automatically assume that a physically beautiful person must also be highly smart and successful too.

chapters.title: Subtle Manipulation: The Darkest Art of Convincing You
chapters.description: We analyze the complex psychology of persuasion. We will identify the powerful hidden techniques that sellers and leaders use to control your daily purchases.

chapters.title: Pressure of a Group: Why We Deny Our Very Own Truth
chapters.description: We explore social conformity through the Asch experiment, demonstrating that we are capable of denying the harsh reality just to fit in perfectly with others.
chapters.thumbnailTitle: You Lie Just to Fit In

chapters.title: Broken Bonds: The Most Hidden Weight of Our Childhood
chapters.description: We delve into Attachment Theory in adults to understand exactly how our upbringing severely affects our relationship dynamics and our security in romantic love.
chapters.thumbnailTitle: Why Do You Love Like That?

chapters.title: Fulfilled Prophecies: All The Power of High Expectations
chapters.description: We study the amazing Pygmalion Effect. We will explain how the simple expectations of other people can dramatically alter our very own personal performance.

chapters.title: Romantic Mirrors: The Immense Myth of Opposites Attract
chapters.description: We debunk the popular belief that opposites attract. The real science of interpersonal attraction proves that in reality we seek pure similarity in a partner.

chapters.title: Dangerous Harmony: The Brutal Failure of Group Thinking
chapters.description: We analyze the Groupthink phenomenon, detailing how incredibly brilliant people make the worst joint decisions just to avoid internal conflicts in the group.

chapters.title: Map of Your Whole Being: The Five Pillars of Your Soul
chapters.description: We explain the Big Five Personality Traits. Learn how modern science classifies human character according to openness, conscientiousness, and pure extraversion.

chapters.title: Reasonable Heart: The Great Triumph Over The Intellect
chapters.description: We address the concept of Emotional Intelligence and why mastering our emotions is usually a better predictor of life success than having a very high IQ score.

chapters.title: Functional Shadows: The Three Faces of Great Wickedness
chapters.description: We explore the disturbing profiles of the Dark Triad of Personality, closely analyzing the inner workings of narcissism, Machiavellianism, and psychopathy.

chapters.title: Fake Frauds: That Atrocious Fear of Undeserved Success
chapters.description: We discuss the overwhelming Impostor Syndrome, that constant feeling of being a total fraud and the absolute inability to accept one's own success as genuine.
chapters.thumbnailTitle: Do You Feel Like a Fraud?

chapters.title: Deep Immersion: Losing The True Notion of Your Whole Being
chapters.description: We detail how to reach the wonderful Flow State, that absolute mental immersion in a task where time, the ego, and all pesky distractions completely disappear.

chapters.title: Emotional Evasion: The Whole Myth of Managing Your Time
chapters.description: We will understand why procrastination as an emotional issue leads us to postpone duties to temporarily escape from highly unpleasant and anxious feelings today.

chapters.title: Silence and Fear: Separating Pure Shyness From a Phobia
chapters.description: We clarify the huge confusion between introversion vs. social anxiety. Draining your social battery is not the same as feeling deep panic of outside judgment.

chapters.title: Ephemeral Happiness: The Sad Return to Eternal Routine
chapters.description: We explain the brutal Hedonic Adaptation, the mechanism by which neither winning the lottery nor a tragedy will manage to alter your base happiness long term.

chapters.title: Feeling or Understanding: Two Great Paths to Compassion
chapters.description: We analyze the clash between empathy vs. sympathy, distinguishing the mental ability to understand someone's pain from truly feeling their suffering inside.

chapters.title: Revealing Faces: The Complete Language of The Great Lie
chapters.description: We deeply explore the famous facial microexpressions. Discover how small and uncontrollable universal gestures give us away when we attempt to tell huge lies.

chapters.title: Born or Made: The Real Origins of Human Cruelty Exposed
chapters.description: We mark the exact limits between psychopathy vs. sociopathy, evaluating the key differences between being born without empathy and developing it defectively.

chapters.title: Fractured Minds: The Heavy Weight of Being Many at Once
chapters.description: We thoroughly investigate Dissociative Identity Disorder. We will separate clinical fiction from the harsh reality directly linked to severe childhood trauma.

chapters.title: Cardboard Happiness: The Atrocious Sadness Nobody Sees
chapters.description: We analyze heartbreaking smiling depression. We will talk about those who suffer deeply internally while exhibiting an absolutely flawless social public facade.

chapters.title: Ritual Prisons: The Very True Face of The Greatest Doubt
chapters.description: We completely debunk myths around Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder (OCD), explaining exactly why this illness goes far beyond a simple desire for extreme cleanliness.

chapters.title: Alternate Realities: When The Mind Creates a New World
chapters.description: We address the complex experiences of schizophrenia and hallucinations. We will observe how the human brain builds perceptions indistinguishable from reality.

chapters.title: Illogical Terrors: From Tiny Spiders to Little Holes
chapters.description: We explore the true evolutionary origins of specific and strange phobias. We'll understand why the human mind panics when facing patterns close together.

chapters.title: Toxic Beliefs: When Your Whole Brain Seeks to Harm You
chapters.description: Meet the mysterious Nocebo Effect. We will analyze how the simple fact of expecting a harm or side effect from something harmless causes a real physical sign.

chapters.title: Panic Storms: The Entire Nervous System on High Alert
chapters.description: We break down the anatomy of a panic attack point by point to deeply understand the nervous system error that triggers pure terror without any actual threat.

chapters.title: Emotions on The Edge: The Atrocious Fear of Abandonment
chapters.description: We discuss the harsh experience of Borderline Personality Disorder (BPD). We will explain the chronic dysregulations and the stormy, severe attachment crises.

chapters.title: Digital Jails: All The Pleasure That Steals Our Control
chapters.description: We detail the hidden mechanisms behind behavioral addictions. Social networks, cell phones, and games alter the brain's reward system just like a street drug.

chapters.title: Flexible Brains: The Incredible Immense Power to Heal
chapters.description: We will carefully explore extraordinary human neuroplasticity, the capacity of your brain mass to generate new connections and regenerate after severe trauma.

chapters.title: Crossed Senses: Tasting Beautiful Colors and Sweet Words
chapters.description: We present the amazing world of synesthesia to you. You will discover the fascinating neurological reality where some people can see sound or touch a flavor.

chapters.title: Soul Reflections: The Real True Science Behind Yawning
chapters.description: We analyze the fascinating mirror neurons, which are essential for human development, responsible for our deep empathy, and make yawning incredibly contagious.

chapters.title: Divided Minds: The Immense Myth of The Two Hemispheres
chapters.description: We break the false belief about the left brain vs. right brain and clearly explain why assigning pure logic or creativity to just a single side is totally unreal.

chapters.title: Visceral Defenses: The Entire Immune Behavioral System
chapters.description: We explain the highly curious evolutionary psychology of disgust. Learn how deep repulsion developed to keep us completely safe from a variety of dire threats.

chapters.title: Neuronal Rebellion: The Whole Mystery of Broken Youth
chapters.description: We carefully analyze the particular behavior of the adolescent brain, justifying lack of control and impulsivity through the late growth of the prefrontal lobe.

chapters.title: Molecules of Love: The Secret Chemistry Behind Your Bond
chapters.description: We completely immerse ourselves in the functions of oxytocin and vasopressin to understand the hidden chemical mechanics behind wild love and eternal loyalty.

chapters.title: Persuasive Tones: All The Secret Power of Those Colors
chapters.description: We apply the psychology of color in daily life, revealing exactly how certain tones subconsciously influence our daily moods and all your shopping decisions.

chapters.title: Unconscious Purchases: Those Traps of Very Vile Buying
chapters.description: We reveal the very powerful tools of neuromarketing, evaluating how background music or aisle layout force your poor wallet to spend a lot more money today.

chapters.title: Illogical Decisions: Your Great Fear of Losing Big Money
chapters.description: We introduce the core concepts of behavioral economics. We will see why we humans make highly irrational financial decisions motivated by mere, simple fear.

chapters.title: Healthy Thoughts: Completely Rewriting Your Own Drama
chapters.description: We detail the core pillars of Cognitive-Behavioral Therapy (CBT), demonstrating that our suffering is born from interpreting facts and not the event itself.

chapters.title: Video Game Lives: Always Playing to Be Much Better Today
chapters.description: We explore the highly useful tool of gamification. We will firmly apply playful elements like daily rewards to radically improve our very normal, daily life.
